title: The Tiger of Eschnapur
writer: Thea von Harbou, Richard Eichberg, Hans Klaehr
actors: Kitty Jantzen, La Jana, Philip Dorn
plot: The Maharadscha vom Eschnapur hires a German architect to build a mausoleum. Burning with vengeance when he finds out his young wife has fallen for an adventurer he develops a deadly plan, while flattering the architect's fiancée ...
